user_goal: BL-IMAGE-PRICING-OR-P2 — OpenRouter 6 条 token-priced image channel 定价 UPDATE + DB trigger 约束 + token 反算单测 + model-sync buildCostPrice 回归修复（裁决新增）

evaluator_feedback.summary: Reverification FAIL: local build/tsc/vitest and DB trigger pass, but production acceptance fails. 32/39 IMAGE channels still have costPrice=0; canonical image smoke returns HTTP 200 but call_logs.costPrice=0 with no token usage; provided smoke script uses a non-existent alias; pricing script hangs under full production env and idempotency required timeout; spec names run-inference for model-sync but actual endpoint is sync-models.

issues.description: Production full IMAGE channel scan fails: 32/39 IMAGE channels still have costPrice={unit:"call",perCall:0}. This violates acceptance #11 and makes #12 impossible for the expected 30+6 non-zero set. The 6 OR token-priced channels remain correct after /api/admin/sync-models, but the other image channels remain zero.
issues.steps_to_reproduce: Run production DB scan in docs/test-reports/artifacts/bl-image-pricing-or-p2-2026-04-25-codex/prod-db-pricing-check.v2.json, then trigger POST /api/admin/sync-models and inspect prod-sync-regression-check.log.

issues.description: Image smoke billing fails. The provided verify script uses model gemini-2.5-flash-image and production returns model_not_found. Manual canonical request with google/gemini-2.5-flash-image succeeds, but call_logs.costPrice is 0 and promptTokens/completionTokens are null, so the token pricing formula cannot pass.
issues.steps_to_reproduce: Run scripts/pricing/verify-or-image-channels-2026-04-25.ts against production (prod-image-smoke.v2.log), then run the manual canonical smoke recorded in prod-image-smoke-manual-canonical.v2.log.

issues.description: Pricing CLI does not exit cleanly when .env.production is loaded because a Redis handle remains open. Apply printed 6 updates, but the process had to be killed; idempotency printed 6 no-change rows but timed out with EXIT_CODE=124. This violates F-BIPOR-05 #5/#8 exit-code expectations.
issues.steps_to_reproduce: ssh production, load .env.production, run npx tsx scripts/pricing/fix-or-image-channels-2026-04-25.ts --apply. See prod-pricing-apply.with-env.log and prod-pricing-idempotency.log.

issues.description: Acceptance/handoff says POST /api/admin/run-inference can trigger model-sync, but current code only calls runModelSync from /api/admin/sync-models. run-inference does classify/brand/capability inference, not model sync.
issues.steps_to_reproduce: Compare src/app/api/admin/run-inference/route.ts with src/app/api/admin/sync-models/route.ts; actual regression trigger used /api/admin/sync-models.

generator_handoff.scope: F-BIPOR-04 model-sync buildCostPrice 回归修复（裁决新增的 generator feature）

targets.summary: buildCostPrice IMAGE 分支返回 null + 调用处第 270-280 行省略 costPrice 字段（R1 方案）；createMany 路径保持现状（新 IMAGE channel 默认 {perCall:0}，靠 F-BIPOR-02 trigger 后续兜底）
(a) sync 已存在 IMAGE channel 且 costPrice 非零 → 不变；(b) sync TEXT channel → 按 token 公式更新；(c) sync 创建新 IMAGE channel → 默认 {perCall:0} 进 createMany

post_fix_validation: 本地：vitest + tsc + build 全过（预期 vitest 总数 381+）
本地：dev DB seed 一个 IMAGE channel costPrice.perCall=0.0370 → 跑 sync → 重查 channel.costPrice 不变
完成后 status→verifying 交 Codex 复验全 13 项（含 #12 生产 model-sync 跑后回归保护）
generator_handoff.notes: 本 fix_round 仅做 buildCostPrice 一处改动；不要顺手修其他 sync 相关 bug。F-BIPOR-04 完成后 Codex 在生产先 apply F-BIPOR-04 deploy → apply F-BIPOR-01 fix-or-image-channels-2026-04-25.ts → 手动 trigger model-sync → 验证 channel costPrice 持久化（验收 #12）。

session_notes.Kimi-build-round-0: F-BIPOR-01~03 building 完成 @ 2026-04-25 12:23，status→verifying。vitest 378 PASS（+25 OR-P2 新单测）/ tsc / build 全过。
session_notes.Andy-mid-impl-adjudication: Mid-impl 裁决 @ 2026-04-25 13:00：Planner 调研用户报告的生产 image log 显示问题时附带发现 model-sync.buildCostPrice 硬编码 IMAGE → {perCall:0}，每日 sync 自动覆盖所有 image channel costPrice。生产实证 P1 F-BAX-08 apply 后 04:00 被冲回 0；OR-P2 F-BIPOR-01 apply 后下次 sync 必失效。用户拍板路径 X：当前批次内修订 spec + 加 F-BIPOR-04（generator R1 方案：IMAGE 跳过 costPrice 写入）+ 验收 #12 回归保护。total_features 4→5；completed 3；status verifying→fixing；fix_rounds 0→1。BL-IMAGE-LOG-DISPLAY-FIX（C 方案，base64 转存对象存储 + 前端图片预览）已写入 backlog，OR-P2 done 后启动。
session_notes.Kimi-fix-round-1:
F-BIPOR-04 完成 @ 2026-04-25 12:42，status fixing→reverifying。

改动（按 R1 最小方案）：
- src/lib/sync/model-sync.ts buildCostPrice() IMAGE → 返回 null（保留运营手设值）
- 拆出 buildInitialCostPrice()：createMany 路径仍写默认 {perCall:0,unit:'call'}
- 调用处第 270-280 行：null 时省略 costPrice 字段，update 只动 realModelId/status
- 新建 channel 路径仍走 buildInitialCostPrice 默认占位，后续 UPDATE 由 F-BIPOR-02 trigger 兜底
- export __testing 暴露两个 helper 给单测

新增 7 单测覆盖 R1 契约：buildCostPrice IMAGE→null + TEXT/AUDIO 不变；buildInitialCostPrice IMAGE→默认占位 + TEXT 同 token 公式；invariant 显式声明两个 helper 不可互换。

vitest 385 PASS（+7 from 378）/ tsc / build 全过。

Codex F-BIPOR-05 13 项验收：#1-#11 部署后 + apply 即可；#12 model-sync 回归保护需 deploy F-BIPOR-04 → 跑 fix-or-image-channels --apply → POST /api/admin/run-inference 触发 sync → 重查 30+6 条 image channel costPrice 全部保持，**不被 sync 冲回 0**。
session_notes.Reviewer: 2026-04-25 reverifying FAIL: local build/tsc/vitest pass; production migration dry-run and trigger pass; 6 OR channels correct and survive /api/admin/sync-models; blockers are 32/39 IMAGE costPrice still zero, image smoke call_log costPrice=0/no usage, smoke script wrong alias, pricing CLI hangs under full production env, and spec uses run-inference for model-sync though actual endpoint is sync-models.
